name: oh-my-codex-research
description: Research-team workflows for OpenAI Codex CLI and oh-my-codex: supervisor, analysis-implementer, paper-writer, figure-descriptor, reviewer, literature-curator.

interface.shortDescription: Research edition workflow bundle for OpenAI Codex CLI and oh-my-codex.
interface.longDescription: OMXR adds research-specific Codex skills, project scaffolding, manuscript workflows, citation checks, figure workflows, and setup-installed research agent templates on top of the base oh-my-codex runtime. The plugin manifest exposes skills; runtime hooks, AGENTS.md scaffolding, state, memory, and optional native-agent installation are handled by omx setup plus $omxr-setup.
